guide.title: User Guide
guide.subtitle: Master every aspect of the Oxide environment.

sidebar.title: Sidebar & Explorer
sidebar.desc: Manage your project files with ease. Features real-time indexing status and a dedicated GPU Mode toggle for performance monitoring.

terminal.title: Terminal Overview
terminal.desc: The heart of Oxide. Use the 'Broadcast' feature to send commands to multiple terminals at once. Supports grid layouts and high-speed Rust execution.

settings.title: Advanced Preferences
settings.desc: Customize your experience: Compact Mode for more space, Vertical Tabs for better organization, and 'Restore Session' to pick up exactly where you left off.

features.title: Advanced Tools
features.desc: Utilize the 'Surgical Watcher' for precise file tracking, 'Infinite Undo' for safe refactoring, and 'Power Shortcuts' for maximum efficiency.

hero.title: Oxide
hero.subtitle: The next-gen workspace. High-performance developer environment built with Tauri and Rust.

footer.tagline: Next-gen developer workspace. High performance, pure glass.

bento.native_desc: Broadcast commands to multiple terminals simultaneously via Rust backend.
bento.glass_desc: Integrated visual gauge and hardware-accelerated rendering.
bento.minimal_desc: A refined, distraction-free interface that stays out of your way.
bento.future_desc: Instant file discovery powered by LSM Sled storage and SQLite.
bento.undo_desc: Safe file operations with a robust undo/redo system.
bento.zoom_desc: Infinite canvas-style zoom to focus or overview your workspace.
bento.shortcuts_desc: Comprehensive keyboard mapping for ultra-fast navigation.
bento.watcher_desc: Real-time filesystem sync with advanced debounce and filtering.

tech.title: Built on Open Standards.
tech.subtitle: Engineered from the ground up for stability.

download.title: Get the latest build.
download.subtitle: Direct binaries from GitHub
download.stay_tuned: Stay tuned for the first build.
